name: Mrs Fields Peanut Butter Cream -Filled Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Light brown sugar, firmly packed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. In a medium bowl, combine flour, baking soda, cinnamon, and oats. Mix well with a wire whisk.
3. Set aside.
4. Cream sugar and butter in a large bowl using an electric mixer on medium speed.
5. Add the flour-oat mixture, and blend at low speed until just combined. Do not overmix.
6. Separate dough into two balls, flatten them into disks, and wrap each tightly in plastic wrap or a plastic bag.
7. Chill for 1 hour.
8. On a floured board, using a floured rolling pin, roll out one disk to 1/4 inch thickness.
9. Cut cookies with a 2-inch round fluted cookie cutter dipped in flour. Repeat procedure with the second disk, reworking scraps until all the dough is used.
10. Bake cookies on ungreased baking sheets 1/2 inch apart for 13-15 minutes or until bottoms turn light brown.
11. Transfer immediately to a cool, flat surface with a spatula.
12. When cookies are cool, spread 1 tablespoon of peanut butter filling on the bottom side of a cookie.
13. Top with another cookie (bottom side toward the filling) to make a sandwich.
14. Repeat with the remaining cookies and filling.
Yield: 3 1/2 dozen cookies.
